title: Replace bcoin regtest daemon with Bitcoin Core regtest in integration tests
description: Audit §Phase 3.15. chain/spawn_chain_daemon.js spawns bcoin. Bcoin is unmaintained for years. Replace with a thin wrapper that expects an external bitcoind already running OR spawns bitcoind directly. Make daemon spawn conditional so CI can reuse one.

title: Upgrade async 2.6 → 3.x to fix 'Callback was already called' in integration tests
description: Integration tests (claim_success.js, refund_success.js) fail at generateAliceKeyPair in async/internal/onlyOnce.js. Bump async to 3.x. Expected minor API changes — verify waterfall/auto/each call sites still work.

title: Research Lightning Network changes 2018-2026 and audit lightpay for needed updates
close_reason: Completed research report and exhaustive update audit. Report at docs/reports/2026-04-05-lightning-network-changes-and-lightpay-update-audit.md

title: Install new core bitcoinjs deps: ecpair, bip32, tiny-secp256k1
description: Add ecpair@^3, bip32@^4, tiny-secp256k1@^2 to package.json. These are the extracted-from-bitcoinjs-lib v6 packages needed for key generation and HD derivation. No code changes yet — dependency install only.
close_reason: bitcoinjs-lib@6.1.7, ecpair@2.1.0, bip32@3.1.0, tiny-secp256k1@2.2.3 installed and loadable; commit 9241789

title: Express middleware update: helmet 3→8, remove body-parser in favor of express.json(), pug 2→3, replace browserify-middleware
description: Upgrade helmet to v8 (hidePoweredBy still works). Bump pug to v3. Drop body-parser (not actually required at top-level; routes use req.body from express.json()). Replace browserify-middleware with esbuild to bundle public/browserify/index.js at build or server-start time. Remove walnut.

title: Update ln-service 2.0.1 → 57.x: migrate lightning/create_address.js and pay_invoice.js to authenticatedLndGrpc + new return shapes
description: Replace lightningDaemon() with authenticatedLndGrpc({cert, macaroon, socket}). Update createAddress return ({address}) and pay/payViaPaymentRequest return shape for payment_secret → secret/payment_preimage. Keep callback style wrappers.

title: Upgrade bitcoinjs-lib to v6.x
description: Bump bitcoinjs-lib from 3.3.2 to 6.1.x (NOT v7 — defer Uint8Array migration). Remove now-obsolete deps: bitcoin-ops, pushdata-bitcoin (if possible). After install, expect compile errors across swaps/ — those are addressed in downstream issues.
close_reason: bitcoinjs-lib@6.1.7, ecpair@2.1.0, bip32@3.1.0, tiny-secp256k1@2.2.3 installed and loadable; commit 9241789

title: Rewrite swaps/refund_transaction.js using Psbt API
description: Same Psbt migration as claim_transaction. Refund path signs with CLTV timelock. Unsigned-tx case should emit psbt.toBase64() instead of raw hex. Custom finalizer for refund witness (empty preimage).
close_reason: v6 migration: payments API + ecpair/bip32 factories + script.signature.encode + low-R signing; all unit tests pass (40 assertions). Commit bfc8639

title: Phase 3: Testing and verification
description: Fix integration tests, bump async/bip39, add network config tests, bech32m/P2TR support + tests, tap upgrade. Follows Phase 2 (lightpay-2ji).

title: Phase 2: Integration Layer modernization
description: Replace node-bitcoin-rpc, update ln-service 2.0.1→57.x, Express/middleware updates, config extraction. Follows Phase 1 (lightpay-3d4, closed).

title: Update chain/generate_key_pair.js for ecpair package
description: ECPair moved to its own 'ecpair' package. Replace ECPair.makeRandom({network}) with ECPairFactory(ecc).makeRandom({network}). Replace .getAddress() (removed) with payments.p2wpkh({pubkey}).address. Use bitcoinjs-lib crypto.hash160() where needed.
close_reason: v6 migration: payments API + ecpair/bip32 factories + script.signature.encode + low-R signing; all unit tests pass (40 assertions). Commit bfc8639

title: Add unit tests for service/network.js and conf/chain_server.json mainnet entry
description: Validate OCW_NETWORK resolution: default=testnet, all of {mainnet,regtest,testnet} accepted, unknown network throws. Also verify chain_rpc.js credentialsFor() returns expected shape for mainnet.

title: Extract hardcoded configuration: network switches, fees, timeouts
description: The audit calls out hardcoded testnet/regtest-only assumptions in get_address_details.js, chain_server config, and fee constants. Make network configurable via env vars and validate mainnet paths. Targets: service/get_address_details.js line ~94, chain/conf/*, swap expiry constants.

title: Update service/server_swap_key_pair.js for bip32 package
description: HDNode was extracted to 'bip32' package. Replace HDNode.fromSeedBuffer() with bip32.fromSeed(). Replace .keyPair.toWIF()/.getPublicKeyBuffer() with .toWIF()/.publicKey on the bip32 node. Verify bip39.mnemonicToSeed() output type matches bip32 v4 input expectation.
close_reason: v6 migration: payments API + ecpair/bip32 factories + script.signature.encode + low-R signing; all unit tests pass (40 assertions). Commit bfc8639

title: Update Node.js engine requirement to >=22 in package.json
description: Change engines field from '8.9.4' to '>=22'. Smoke-test that 'npm install' resolves and 'node -e' runs on Node 22. Affects: package.json.
close_reason: engines.node->=22, engines.npm->=10; commit in working tree

title: Replace node-bitcoin-rpc with modern fetch-based JSON-RPC client in chain/chain_rpc.js
description: Replace unmaintained node-bitcoin-rpc (last release 2018) with a thin fetch-based wrapper using Node's global fetch. Preserve the ({cmd, network, params}, cbk) signature. Handle HTTP errors and JSON-RPC error codes. Remove node-bitcoin-rpc from dependencies.

title: Phase 1: Foundation update — Node.js 22 + bitcoinjs-lib v6 migration
description: Epic covering the critical path update work identified in the 2026-04-05 audit. Brings the codebase to Node 22 LTS and bitcoinjs-lib v6, which unblocks all further Lightning/chain/middleware updates. Reference: docs/reports/2026-04-05-lightning-network-changes-and-lightpay-update-audit.md (Phase 1, items 1-8).
close_reason: All Phase 1 subtasks complete: Node engines updated, bitcoinjs-lib@6 + ecpair/bip32/tiny-secp256k1 installed, all swaps/chain code migrated, 40/40 unit tests passing. Commits 81a3703, 9241789, bfc8639

title: Rewrite swaps/claim_transaction.js using Psbt API
description: TransactionBuilder removed in v6 — rewrite claim tx construction using Psbt. Custom finalizeInput callback required for HTLC preimage-reveal witness. Replace ECPair.fromWIF + sign + ECSignature.toScriptSignature with Psbt.signInput + custom finalizer. Update imports from 'bitcoinjs-lib' to 'ecpair'. Audit fee/weight estimation (lines ~164-188).
close_reason: v6 migration: payments API + ecpair/bip32 factories + script.signature.encode + low-R signing; all unit tests pass (40 assertions). Commit bfc8639

title: Add bech32m (P2TR) support to service/get_address_details.js + tests
description: Audit §2.7. Address decoding should recognize bc1p.../tb1p... (P2TR, version 1). Use address.fromBech32 and check version === 1 + data length 32. Tests cover mainnet/testnet P2TR + legacy P2PKH/P2SH/P2WPKH/P2WSH cases.

title: Defer OCW_CLAIM_BIP39_SEED check in server_swap_key_pair.js (remove side effect on module load)
description: Currently module load fails with process.exit() if env var missing. Move validation into the exported function so modules can be loaded in tests without the env var.

title: Update swaps/swap_script_details.js for new script decompile API
description: script.decompile() still exists but output format changed in v6. Audit the decoding logic. Also update scriptHash/witnessScriptHash/witnessPubKeyHash.output.encode() calls here to payments API.
close_reason: v6 migration: payments API + ecpair/bip32 factories + script.signature.encode + low-R signing; all unit tests pass (40 assertions). Commit bfc8639

title: Upgrade bip39 2.5 → 3.x and handle new async API / Buffer vs Uint8Array return
description: bip39 v3 made mnemonicToSeed async (returns Promise). service/server_swap_key_pair.js calls it sync. Need to either use mnemonicToSeedSync or restructure. Validate bip32.fromSeed still accepts the result.

title: Rewrite swaps/swap_address.js using payments API
description: script.scriptHash/witnessScriptHash/witnessPubKeyHash.output.encode() are removed. Migrate to payments.p2sh / payments.p2wsh / payments.p2wpkh. Keep existing 3 output formats (P2SH, P2SH-P2WSH, P2WSH) — P2TR addition deferred to Phase 4.
close_reason: v6 migration: payments API + ecpair/bip32 factories + script.signature.encode + low-R signing; all unit tests pass (40 assertions). Commit bfc8639

title: Research Lightning Network protocol changes 2018-2026
Upgrade tap 11 → 21 (or migrate to node --test)
description: tap 21 is a major rewrite. Alternative: migrate the ~5 test files to node built-in test runner. Evaluate both paths; the in-file API surface used is small (test(), t.equal(), t.throws()).

title: Research Bitcoin Lightning Network ecosystem 2018-2026
